definition: collection of properties providing information about the effectivity associated to items with respect to defined points in time.

definition_ml.en: collection of properties providing information about the effectivity associated to items with respect to defined points in time.

remark:
Example: period of time for which something, e.g. a certificate, is current, that lasts from the date on which it becomes effective (“effective date”), resulting from a decision of the body responsible for it, until it is withdrawn or replaced
ISO/IEC Guide 2:2004, 9.3, mod

remark_ml.en:
Example: period of time for which something, e.g. a certificate, is current, that lasts from the date on which it becomes effective (“effective date”), resulting from a decision of the body responsible for it, until it is withdrawn or replaced
